0.text: Compressive atelectasis associated with left pleural effusion

1.text: Right pleural effusion measuring up to 8 mm

2.text: Adjacent parenchymal consolidation with right pleural effusion

3.text: Area of consolidation in the superior and middle portions of the left lower lobe

4.text: Air bronchograms within the consolidation in the left lower lobe

5.text: Ground glass opacities in the lower lobes of both lungs

6.text: Linear subsegmental atelectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs

8.text: More pronounced fibroatelectatic changes on the right upper lobe
